---
name: 🚀 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## 🎯 Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Is your feature request related to a problem?

**Example**: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## 💡 Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

What other approaches have you considered?

## 📐 Implementation Details

If you have technical ideas about how to implement this:

- Which modules would be affected?
- Are there any external dependencies needed?
- Would this affect existing tests?

## 📊 Use Cases

Who would benefit from this feature? What real-world scenarios does it enable?

## 🎨 Mockups / Examples

If applicable, add mockups, diagrams, or code examples.

## 📌 Priority

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Critical — blocking my use of the bot
- [ ] High — would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Medium — nice to have
- [ ] Low — minor improvement

## 🤝 Willingness to Contribute

- [ ] I'm willing to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] I can help test, but not implement
- [ ] Just an idea, no implementation help

## 📌 Additional Context

Add any other context, links, or references about the feature request here.
